snippets.name: Accessibility: landmarks, labels & ARIA (a11y pass)
Accessibility: server-side markup fixes (W3C)
snippets.description: Accessibility (static-HTML / W3C): front-end output buffer that removes the prohibited aria-label from role-less .player-panel-row divs (#3) and promotes h3.ssp-episode-title to h2 (#4). Companion to the runtime JS snippet.

snippets.name: Sydney: strip empty CSS declarations (W3C)
snippets.description: W3C/CSS validity: removes Sydney theme dynamic-CSS declarations that have an empty value (e.g. color:;) or a bare unit (letter-spacing:px;), which occur when a Customizer colour/typography option is left blank. Hooks the theme's own sydney_custom_css filter.

snippets.name: Sydney: HTML validity fixes (W3C)
Accessibility: redundant link & title cleanup (WAVE)
